subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Clothe Thou the hearts of Thy loved ones with the armor of steadfastness and assurance, lest they be affected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی فالبس قلوب احبائک درع الاستقامه و الاطمینان لئلا یوثر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for detachment
